acceptance_criteria:
1. RendererOverride enum with Style, Template, Func variants
2. Constructor helpers for each variant
3. Static lifetimes where appropriate
4. Debug and Clone derived
5. Maps 1:1 to #[render(...)] attribute forms
6. cargo check passes
title: Implement RendererOverride for field-level customization

acceptance_criteria:
1. DefaultJinjaRender trait marked #[deprecated] with clear message
2. Deprecation note says: 'Use #[render(default = "...")] attribute instead'
3. OR: trait removed entirely if no external users
4. All internal uses migrated to #[render(...)]
5. No compiler warnings from our own code
6. MIGRATION TEST: Code using DefaultJinjaRender compiles with deprecation warning (not hard error)
7. Optional: register_legacy_renderer helper for gradual migration
8. cargo check passes
description:
DELETE the DefaultJinjaRender trait entirely. No deprecation, no migration helper, no soft warnings. KILL IT.

Location: crates/baml-bridge/src/render_trait.rs

Actions:
1. DELETE render_trait.rs entirely
2. REMOVE 'pub use render_trait::DefaultJinjaRender;' from lib.rs
3. DELETE any impl blocks (REPLHistory already migrated to #[render(...)])

There are NO external users. This is internal code. Kill it.

```rust
// DELETE THIS ENTIRE FILE: render_trait.rs
// It's gone. It never existed.
```

Acceptance Criteria:
1. render_trait.rs DELETED
2. DefaultJinjaRender removed from lib.rs exports
3. No #[deprecated] - just gone
4. No migration helper - just gone
5. No warnings - just compile error if anyone tries to use it
6. cargo check passes
title: DELETE DefaultJinjaRender trait

description: Verify: 1) rig-rlm builds with dspy-rs rlm feature, 2) Example compiles using TypedRlm::call() with Signature input struct, 3) Re-exports allow use dspy_rs::rlm_type without direct rlm-derive dependency.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Phase 6 acceptance (per `dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`):
- `dspy-rs` `rlm` feature enabled; feature gates pyo3 + rlm crates.
- `RlmError` types defined and used by TypedRlm flow.
- Example with trajectory analysis compiles and runs.
- `lib.rs` exports `TypedRlm`, configs, errors, adapters as needed.

title: Acceptance: Phase 6 complete

description: Test: getters work, __repr__ matches template, __len__/__iter__/__getitem__ behave as configured. Verify #[derive(RlmType)] without #[pyclass] fails at compile time with clear error.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 7.2 in dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md): verification checklist for `#[rlm_type]` pyclass behavior.
Include: getters, repr template, iter/len/getitem if configured, __rlm_schema__ available, and `__baml__()` returns JSON-like dict.

title: Task 7.2: Test #[rlm_type] pyclass behavior
